title: Release key for 3.0.0 has expired
body:
Yo!

Seems like the key that belongs to @mheon has expired. It's the key that has signed the v3.0.0 tag and previous tags. No updates on the keyserver and the key fetched from their github profile is not updated either.

comments.body: I definitely updated the expiration for the key locally and pushed it to a keyserver. Maybe Github also requires a new copy of the pubkey?
Which keyserver? I'm not sure if I'm failing at fetching it because of the keyservers being wonkey these days. Nothing on WKDs either :/
I just re-pushed to pool.sks-keyservers.net and pgp.mit.edu, in case it hadn't updated.
I was pulling from keyserver.ubuntu.com as the sks keypool has been broken for a while. Got it now :) Thanks!
